headline: Is Halozyme Therapeutics (HALO) One of the Most Undervalued Biotech Stocks to Buy Right Now?
summary: Halozyme Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:HALO) is one of the most undervalued biotech stocks to buy right now. Halozyme Therapeutics, Inc. (NASDAQ:HALO) announced on April 7 that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Halozyme Hypercon, Inc., entered into a global exclusive collaboration and license agreement with Vertex Pharmaceuticals Incorporated. According to the collaboration, Vertex has licensed Halozyme Therapeutics’ (NASDAQ:HALO) Hypercon™ technology […]
